description: Reduce signup form to email+password only. Capture name, phone, organization after email confirmation on /auth/complete-profile. Unify email and OAuth flows through the same complete-profile page.

userStories.title: Lightweight signup form (email + password only)
userStories.description: As a new user, I want a short signup form so that I can create my account quickly
acceptanceCriteria: Signup form shows only: email, password, confirm password, terms checkbox
firstName, lastName, phone, organization fields are removed
Zod schema in auth-actions.ts no longer requires firstName/lastName
Auth metadata sent without first_name/last_name/phone/organization
Signup confirmation email uses email prefix as firstName fallback
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Stripped signup-form.tsx from 7 fields to 3+terms. Cleaned unused imports (Phone, logError, useRouter, createServerTeamService). Email prefix fallback for confirmation email.

userStories.title: DB trigger handles partial profile (no name = no team)
userStories.description: As the system, when a user confirms email without name metadata, I create a partial profile without team/subscription
acceptanceCriteria: Trigger no longer raises exception when first_name is empty
When first_name is empty: creates user with name=email_prefix, team_id=NULL, skips team/subscription creation
When first_name is present: existing behavior unchanged (creates team+sub)
Invitation flow (team_id in metadata) unchanged
Migration file created and valid SQL
userStories.notes: Rewrote 20260317100000 migration with 3-branch IF: invitation (unchanged) → lightweight (partial profile, no team) → full signup (team+sub, org as team name). SPLIT_PART for email prefix.

userStories.title: ConfirmFlow redirects to complete-profile when no team
userStories.description: As a user who just confirmed email, I am redirected to complete-profile instead of dashboard when my profile has no team
acceptanceCriteria: ConfirmFlow checks profileData.teamId after polling
If teamId is null, redirects to /auth/complete-profile
If teamId exists (invitation flow), redirects to dashboard as before
Lint passes
userStories.notes: checkProfileCreated already returns teamId — just needed conditional redirect in confirm-flow.tsx line 91.

userStories.title: Unified complete-profile page handles both email and OAuth users
userStories.description: As a user (email or OAuth), I can complete my profile with name, phone, organization on the same page
acceptanceCriteria: Page detects existing partial profile (email signup) vs no profile (OAuth)
Form shows: firstName, lastName, phone (optional), organization (optional)
Organization field hint: 'Sera utilisé comme nom de votre espace de travail'
For email signup: pre-fills email from existing profile
For OAuth: pre-fills name from Google data (existing behavior)
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Page now checks team_id instead of profile existence. Form adds organization field + isEmailSignup hidden flag. Contextual messaging per flow.

userStories.title: Complete-profile action handles update + team creation
userStories.description: As the system, when completing a profile, I update name and create team/subscription for email signups, or create everything for OAuth
acceptanceCriteria: Detects existing profile (email) vs no profile (OAuth)
Email flow: updates name/phone on existing user, creates team with organization name (or fallback), creates subscription
OAuth flow: unchanged behavior (creates user+team+sub)
Organization used as team name when provided, fallback to 'Prénom Nom' otherwise
Admin notification sent after profile completion
Redirects to dashboard after success
Lint passes
userStories.notes: Unified completeProfileAction with isEmailSignup flag. Email: update name+phone → create team → link+member+subscription (Promise.all). OAuth: preserved. Organization as team name. Old export aliased for compat.
